## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.9

### WebRTC
- Prevents an older or failed Home Assistant camera session from stopping a newer active WebRTC live view.
- Keeps the cached WebRTC ticket when only replacing or closing an old signaling session.
- Reduces Home Assistant ICE candidate debug noise while keeping useful candidate counts.

### Camera Events
- Removes repeated per-record duplicate camera history logs while keeping the camera history poll summary.

### Documentation
- Clarifies that cameras expose Motion and AI Detection as Home Assistant event entities.
- Updates the camera notification blueprint wording to explain that the default notification action can be replaced with a working notification target.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage so replacing an old WebRTC signal session does not stop camera live view.
- Adds regression coverage so closing one frontend WebRTC session keeps live view running when another session is still active.
